subject: perfect style is invisible on google
body:
Hi there,

I came across The Perfect Style while looking at salons in North Vernon. Full-service family salon at a good location.

But right now Eden Salon has a real website and you don't. When someone searches for hair salon near North Vernon, they're finding your competitor first.

I can mock up what your site could look like on a phone -- clean, modern, easy to book from. Takes me 10 minutes and it's yours to keep.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
